title: rubus ochrosetus
intro: Rubus ochrosetus, also known as the yellow-bracted bramble, is a species of bramble in the rose family that is native to China. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus ochrosetus include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exerting antimicrobial and anticancer activities. Herbal preparations of Rubus ochrosetus can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throat, and digestive issues.
